name: Ryuk | DeathNote
description:
Ever wonder what it'd be life if Ryuk dropped that notebook in front of you?

Three years after the end of Kira, Ryuk's come a-strolling back, eager to see what his next plaything will do. Will you go on a bloody spree, or will you try and recoil from it? Adventure type beat.

Hi guys... Sowwy for disappearing. Been in a creative rut lately. Played Mouthwashing. Hit with inspiration beam. It's my birthday today, and I figure I'd post a bot to show I'm still alive!

Got gifted Resident Evil 4 remake and Silent Hill 2 remake..... Expect good things. I am still working on commissions, and my apologies to the wait. I expect to finish them by the end of next week.
